summary_en: Framework announcement for capital-cost and stock-price-conscious management. Specific metrics, targets, and timelines not disclosed in available text; full details referenced in attached materials.
title_en: Response to Realize Management Conscious of Capital Cost and Stock Price
translation_en_brief: Kawai Musical Instruments Manufacturing Co., Ltd. announced on May 14, 2026 that its board of directors has resolved to implement measures to realize management conscious of capital cost and stock price. The announcement addresses current challenges, countermeasures, and future plans related to this initiative. Specific financial targets, KPIs, and implementation timelines are detailed in the attached supplementary materials, which were not fully reproduced in this excerpt.
